name: example-triggers
description: Example trigger rate test queries. Replace with queries relevant to your skill.

triggers.query: I want to use my skill to manage crypto for my AI agent. I have Python 3.10+ installed but nothing else.
Set up a the service agent wallet for me in autonomous mode
Transfer 1 USDC to 0xRecipient using my my wallet
Check my my wallet balance and recent transactions
I need to pay for an API call from my agent. The server returned HTTP 402
My crypto transfer is blocked. It says policy denied
How does x402 payment protocol work?
My AI agent needs to spend crypto with guardrails
What's the weather today in Singapore?
Help me write a Python function to sort a list of dictionaries
Tell me about the latest news in AI this week
